headline: Stock Index Futures Climb on AI Optimism and U.S.-Iran Peace Deal Hopes
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.36%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.56% this morning as optimism surrounding artificial intelligence and hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal boosted sentiment.

headline: Synopsys raises annual forecast on demand for AI chip design software
summary: Synopsys raised its annual results forecast on Wednesday, signaling steady demand for ‌its chip design software from companies racing to develop AI chips ‌and infrastructure.  Demand tied to AI has been strong as chipmakers and hyperscalers invest in more complex semiconductor ​designs and intelligent systems.  Synopsys expects fiscal 2026 revenue between $9.63 billion and $9.71 billion, up from its previous forecast of $9.56 billion to $9.66 billion, with a midpoint above analyst estimates of $9.63 billion, according to LSEG data.

content.title: Synopsys raises annual forecast on demand for AI chip design software
content.summary: Synopsys raised its annual results forecast on Wednesday, signaling steady demand for ‌its chip design software from companies racing to develop AI chips ‌and infrastructure.  Demand tied to AI has been strong as chipmakers and hyperscalers invest in more complex semiconductor ​designs and intelligent systems.  Synopsys expects fiscal 2026 revenue between $9.63 billion and $9.71 billion, up from its previous forecast of $9.56 billion to $9.66 billion, with a midpoint above analyst estimates of $9.63 billion, according to LSEG data.

headline: Synopsys Shares Fall Despite Earnings Beat With AI and Merger in Focus
summary: The chip-design software and hardware firm beat analyst expectations for both earnings and revenue. It also raised its full-year guidance.

headline: Synopsys reaches settlement with Elliott, says Jesse Cohn to join board
summary: Chip design software maker Synopsys has reached an agreement with activist investor Elliott Investment Management that will give one board seat to the activist investor's ‌managing partner Jesse Cohn, the company said on Wednesday.  Synopsys, which has a market valuation ​of about $100 billion and counts Tesla and Google parent Alphabet among its customers, has held discussions with Elliott, one of the industry's most powerful activists, for roughly two months.  “Synopsys is essential to the global chip industry and is well-positioned to benefit from increasing AI investment and engineering complexity,” Cohn said in a statement.

content.title: Synopsys reaches settlement with Elliott, says Jesse Cohn to join board
content.summary: Chip design software maker Synopsys has reached an agreement with activist investor Elliott Investment Management that will give one board seat to the activist investor's ‌managing partner Jesse Cohn, the company said on Wednesday.  Synopsys, which has a market valuation ​of about $100 billion and counts Tesla and Google parent Alphabet among its customers, has held discussions with Elliott, one of the industry's most powerful activists, for roughly two months.  “Synopsys is essential to the global chip industry and is well-positioned to benefit from increasing AI investment and engineering complexity,” Cohn said in a statement.

headline: Synopsys Appoints Jesse Cohn to Board of Directors
summary: Synopsys, Inc.(NASDAQ: SNPS) today announced it has entered into a cooperation agreement with Elliott Investment Management L.P. (together with certain affiliates, "Elliott"), including the appointment of Jesse Cohn to its board of directors as an independent director, effective June 1, 2026. Cohn is a Managing Partner at Elliott with a long track record of success as an investor in and director of public technology companies.

content.title: Synopsys Appoints Jesse Cohn to Board of Directors
content.summary: Synopsys, Inc.(NASDAQ: SNPS) today announced it has entered into a cooperation agreement with Elliott Investment Management L.P. (together with certain affiliates, "Elliott"), including the appointment of Jesse Cohn to its board of directors as an independent director, effective June 1, 2026. Cohn is a Managing Partner at Elliott with a long track record of success as an investor in and director of public technology companies.

headline: Synopsys Posts Financial Results for Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026
summary: Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today reported results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026. Revenue for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 was $2.276 billion, compared to $1.604 billion for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025.

content.title: Synopsys Posts Financial Results for Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026
content.summary: Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today reported results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026. Revenue for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 was $2.276 billion, compared to $1.604 billion for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025.

headline: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
summary: (Bloomberg) -- While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.
